name: visual-design
description: Visual design system toolkit with UX/usability expert review. Consultant skill for establishing design systems via interview or site extraction with page discovery, parallel fingerprinting, fluid responsive detection, and custom component motion discovery. Component-context skill with fuzzy matching for on-demand spec delivery. Design-reviewer skill and agent for live visual quality gate testing via Chrome browser inspection — now includes Category F UX and Usability Review (visual hierarchy, information architecture, navigation, cognitive load, cross-breakpoint consistency, interaction feedback, content readability at desktop and mobile). Fully report-only with categorized fix suggestions. Uses opus agent with haiku sub-agent for cost-efficient mechanical inspection dispatch. Update-component-index skill for regenerating the component compendium index.
